name: minibili-workers
description: MiniBili Xcode Cloud, Telegram and TestFlight automation worker.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check scripts/backfill-public-rollouts.js && python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; compile(Path('scripts/sync_asc_public_rollouts.py').read_text(), 'scripts/sync_asc_public_rollouts.py', 'exec')"
